task_completion.description: Open the portfolio application or interface
task_completion.visual_evidence: A portfolio application or web interface is open and displaying 'My Portfolio'.
The portfolio interface clearly displays the assets AAPL, MSFT, and NVDA.
The interface is filtered to show 'buy' transactions, or the agent is explicitly selecting the buy transactions for the target symbols.
An 'Export', 'Save As', or 'Download' dialog box is visible on the screen, or an export button has been clicked.

task_completion.description: Specify the correct file path and name
task_completion.visual_evidence: The save dialog shows the target directory '/home/ga/Documents' and the filename 'portfolio_export.csv', OR a file manager/terminal shows the file being moved/renamed to this exact path.

task_completion.description: Verify the exported CSV file exists with data
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, text editor, or terminal window shows 'portfolio_export.csv' successfully created in '/home/ga/Documents' with visible content or a file size greater than 50 bytes.

integrity.description: Agent used the graphical interface to export data
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacted with a graphical portfolio application or web interface to view and export the data, rather than generating the file directly via terminal commands (e.g., echo or cat).

integrity.description: File was generated via application export functionality
integrity.visual_evidence: The CSV file was created using the application's built-in export/download feature, not by manually typing the CSV contents into a text editor.
The exported data corresponds to the actual portfolio contents shown on screen, rather than being manually constructed from the task description text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file path is exactly '/home/ga/Documents/portfolio_export.csv'. The exported CSV must contain buy transactions for the symbols AAPL, MSFT, and NVDA. The resulting file should have a minimum size of 50 bytes (indicating it contains actual transaction data, not just an empty file).
